reasons: Kaja can suppress Aldous after Aldous commits into the backline.
Suppression prevents Aldous from freely continuing basic attacks or escaping after a dive.

proof.summary: Aldous wants to dive one target and continue pressure after landing, while Kaja can suppress and drag him into the team's follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Kaja saves Divine Judgment for Aldous's landing.
The protected carry stays close enough for Kaja to counter-engage.
failureCases: Aldous targets someone outside Kaja's range.
Kaja uses suppression before Aldous commits.
Aldous has enough backup to punish Kaja's counter-engage.

reasons: Franco can suppress Aldous after Aldous dives, buying time for the team to kill or disengage.
Hook can punish Aldous when he farms or rotates predictably.

proof.summary: Aldous wants a clean single-target dive, while Franco can interrupt his follow-up with suppression and isolate him from the target.
worksBestWhen: Franco stays near the likely Aldous target.
Franco saves Bloody Hunt until Aldous commits.
failureCases: Franco is not near the target Aldous chooses.
Aldous baits Franco ultimate with another frontline engage.
Franco suppresses without allied damage nearby.

reasons: Chou can kick Aldous away from the target after Aldous lands.
Chou's control immunity helps him survive or reposition around Aldous's engage timing.

proof.summary: Aldous wants to stick to one target after impact, while Chou can displace him and break the dive follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Chou waits for Aldous to land before using The Way of Dragon.
Chou kicks Aldous toward allied damage or away from the carry.
failureCases: Chou's team cannot punish Aldous after displacement.

reasons: Khufra can protect the backline with body positioning and follow-up control.
Bouncing Ball and Tyrant control make it harder for Aldous to freely continue after landing.

proof.summary: Aldous wants to isolate a squishy target, while Khufra can stand near that target and punish Aldous's dive path with tank control.
worksBestWhen: Khufra stays close to the Aldous target instead of chasing elsewhere.
Khufra uses crowd control after Aldous commits.
failureCases: Aldous targets a split-pushing ally far from Khufra.
Khufra wastes control before Aldous ult.
Aldous has enough damage to kill before Khufra reacts.

reasons: Belerick can stand as a durable peel target and taunt Aldous after he dives.
Belerick punishes Aldous better when Aldous is forced to fight a tank instead of a fragile backliner.

proof.summary: Aldous wants to burst a fragile hero, while Belerick can peel with taunt and force Aldous to fight into a tank instead of a carry.
worksBestWhen: Belerick positions near the hero Aldous wants.
Belerick saves taunt until Aldous lands.
failureCases: Aldous ignores Belerick and targets a separated carry.
Belerick cannot reach Aldous after the landing.
Aldous has enough stacks to burst before peel arrives.
